name: Rod of Hellish Flames
description:
Glowing cinders orbit the flanged head of this black iron rod.
This rod can be used as an arcane focus. While holding this rod, you gain the following benefits:
{"type": "list", "style": "list-hang-notitle", "items": [{"type": "item", "name": "Hellish Resistance", "entries": ["You have resistance to fire and necrotic damage."]}, {"type": "item", "name": "Searing Rebuke", "entries": ["You can cast the {@spell Hellish Rebuke} spell as a 4th-level spell (save {@dc 16}) from the rod.
